ICreateDescription Property

One Identity Manager API Server
Gets or sets the description for the method verb used to create a new entity.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Crud
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
string Description { get; set; }

Property Value

Type: String
Remarks
If this value is null, the method description will be used.
